ham.subject: Important: Updated Company Leave Policy Effective May 1, 2024
ham.body:
Dear Team,

I hope this message finds you well. We have updated our company leave policy to provide more flexibility and support for our employees. Please review the key changes below:

1. Additional Paid Holidays: Starting May 1, 2024, each employee will receive 4 extra paid holidays per year.
2. Remote Work Days: Employees can now accrue up to 5 remote work days per month.
3. Parental Leave: Maternity and paternity leave have been extended to 12 weeks each.
4. Sick Leave Accrual: Sick leave will now be accrued at 1 day per 30 days of work.

A detailed PDF of the new policy is attached for your reference. If you have any questions or need clarification, please reach out to HR at hr@company.com.

Thank you for your continued dedication and hard work.

Best regards,

Rajesh Kumar
HR Manager

Company Inc.

spam.subject: Urgent: Ticket #12345 Requires Immediate Action
spam.body:
Hello [Employee Name],

This is an automated notification from the IT Helpdesk regarding your support ticket #12345. Our records indicate that the issue with your laptop's network connectivity has not been resolved and requires immediate attention.

Please click on the link below to verify your account details and confirm the ticket status. Failure to do so within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your network access.

<URL>

Once verified, our technicians will schedule a repair session at your earliest convenience.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best,

IT Support Team

[Company Name] IT
